Welcome to the blog

This is the opening paragraph of a fairly typical WordPress post that has been imported into GoNext. It introduces the topic in plain prose.

A short list of things I learned

  • Block trees are easier to reason about than freeform HTML.
  • Lossy-but-honest beats silently dropping bytes.
  • Test coverage on importers pays for itself in week one.

Here is a quote that captures the sentiment nicely:

The best time to convert your content was yesterday; the second-best time is during a migration.

An importer that knew what it was doing

Some code, finally

func Convert(b []byte) ([]Block, error) {
    return []Block{{Name: "core/paragraph"}}, nil
}

That's the end of the post.
